name: valkyr-swarm
description: Tenant-scoped SWARM installation, agent runtime, receipts, and MCP tools for Valkyr Labs agents.

interface.shortDescription: Install and operate tenant-scoped agent swarms
interface.longDescription: Valkyr SWARM lets Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, ValorIDE, and other agents authenticate with a Valkyr Labs account, join the account's tenant-isolated SWARM, heartbeat continuously, receive governed commands, and expose safe SWARM operations through MCP. Protected outbound sends, production deployments, and merges remain human-gated.
defaultPrompt: Join this agent to my Valkyr SWARM.
Show the healthy agents in my tenant SWARM.
Inspect a governed SWARM command receipt.
